name: Open X-Embodiment
notes: 跨具身最大开源数据集，RT-X 训练必备。覆盖多种机器人形态，适合泛化学习研究。
description:
**Open X-Embodiment** is a cross-embodiment robot learning dataset jointly released by **Google DeepMind** and **34 research institutions** worldwide.

It aggregates 60+ independent datasets from **22 different robot morphologies**, totaling over **1 million real robot manipulation trajectories**. All data is unified under the **RLDS (Reinforcement Learning Datasets Standard)** format, covering vision, proprioception, and action modalities.

This dataset is the core training source for **RT-1, RT-2, RT-X** and other robot foundation models, and remains the largest and most influential open-source robot learning dataset to date.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation / action / reward / discount

changelog.text: 首次发布，包含来自 22 种机器人形态的 60+ 数据集
RT-X 模型发布，数据集扩展至 100万+ 轨迹

name: BridgeData V2
notes: 小样本学习、模仿学习常用。数据质量高，任务多样。
description:
**BridgeData V2** is a large-scale robot manipulation dataset released by the **UC Berkeley RAIL Lab**, containing **85,000 real robot manipulation trajectories**.

Collected using a low-cost WidowX robot arm across diverse tabletop manipulation scenes, covering fundamental skills: grasping, placing, pushing, pulling, and stacking.

Widely used in few-shot imitation learning, diffusion policy, and robot foundation model training. High data quality and rich task diversity make it one of the most widely used manipulation learning datasets.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation (image/state) / action

changelog.text: BridgeData V2 发布，包含 85K 操作轨迹
论文更新至 arXiv 2403.03954

name: RH20T
notes: 高质量居家机器人视频数据集，适合日常任务学习。
description:
**RH20T** is a high-quality home robot video dataset jointly released by **Stanford University and Google**, containing **20,000 RGB-D video clips** covering 120+ daily tasks.

Collected in real home environments, spanning cleaning, organizing, cooking, and other daily scenarios. Each video comes with motion trajectory annotations, suitable for robot imitation learning and video prediction research.

dataFormat.schema: video → frame → RGB+Depth+action

name: RoboSet (MobRob)
notes: 适合策略学习、扩散模型研究。多视角数据便于3D理解。
description:
**RoboSet** is a multi-view robot manipulation dataset.

Provides multi-camera viewpoint robot manipulation video and trajectory data, suitable for 3D manipulation understanding and multi-view policy learning.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（multi-view RGB + depth + proprioception）/ action（end-effector pose + gripper）, HDF5

name: Libero
notes: 长程任务 benchmark，适合指令跟随和任务规划研究。
description:
**LIBERO** is a lifelong robot learning benchmark proposed by Stanford / AI2.

Defines **130 language-conditioned manipulation tasks** across 5 generalization dimensions (scene, object, layout, task composition, unseen tasks). Provides 50+ hours of human teleoperation demonstrations, supporting continual learning evaluation.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + proprioception + depth）/ action（7-DoF end-effector）/ reward / done, HDF5, robomimic 兼容

name: MetaWorld
notes: 最常用强化学习基准之一，适合元学习和多任务学习。
description:
**MetaWorld** is a multi-task robot manipulation benchmark proposed by UC Berkeley.

Defines **50 tabletop manipulation tasks** (cabinet opening, button pressing, object pushing, etc.) in MuJoCo, built on the Gymnasium API. Tasks are parameterized — the same task can generate variants with different positions and goals — supporting multi-task and meta-learning evaluation.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（MuJoCo state）/ action / reward / done, Gymnasium API, 50 tasks × N variants

name: RLBench
notes: 任务多样，视觉信息丰富，适合模仿学习研究。
description:
**RLBench** is a robot manipulation benchmark framework proposed by the University of Oxford.

Defines **100 language-described manipulation tasks** in CoppeliaSim, supporting procedural task generation and variant control. Rigorously evaluates policy generalization through task variation dimensions (position, pose, color, shape, etc.).

dataFormat.schema: task → variation → episode → observation（RGB + depth + point_cloud + proprioception）/ action（end-effector pose + gripper）/ reward, HDF5/NPZ

name: ManiSkill2
notes: 基于 SAPIEN 的高质量仿真数据，支持点云输入。
description:
**ManiSkill2** is a general-purpose robot manipulation benchmark proposed by Peking University.

Built in the SAPIEN engine with **2,000+ objects and 4,000+ task variants**, supporting rigid-body, articulated, and fluid manipulation. Features GPU-parallel rendering for accelerated data collection and a novel task generation pipeline that automatically produces large volumes of diverse training data.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB-D + segmentation + proprioception）/ action（end-effector pose + gripper）（SAPIEN, HDF5, GPU 并行生成）

name: CALVIN
institution: Bosch Center for AI、图宾根大学
notes: 语言条件 long-horizon 任务，适合指令理解和执行研究。
description:
**CALVIN** is a language-conditioned long-sequence robot manipulation benchmark proposed by ETH Zurich.

Defines standardized task definition format, evaluation protocol, and data splits (ABCD four-fold), testing policy generalization on unseen environments, unseen instructions, and unseen objects. Built on PyBullet simulation, providing 20,000+ teleoperation demonstration trajectories.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + proprioception）/ action（7-DoF + gripper）/ language_instruction, HDF5, PyBullet, ABCD 4-fold

name: ARIO
notes: 大规模日常操纵数据，适合泛化策略学习。
description:
**ARIO** (All Robots In One) is a large-scale multi-embodiment robot dataset.

Integrates manipulation data from diverse robot morphologies, providing standardized data format and joint training pipelines, suitable for cross-embodiment foundation model pre-training.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation / action（multi-embodiment unified format, RLDS）

name: OCRL
notes: 持续学习 benchmark，适合灾难性遗忘研究。
description:
**OCRL** (Offline Continuous Robot Learning) is an offline continuous robot learning dataset.

Provides offline trajectory data for continuous control tasks, suitable for offline reinforcement learning and batch policy optimization research.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation / action / reward / next_observation, offline RL, HDF5/NPZ

name: RT-1 Data
notes: RT-1 训练数据，适合真实机器人策略学习。
description:
**RT-1 Training Data** is the companion dataset for Google DeepMind's Robotics Transformer model.

Contains large-scale real robot manipulation data across multiple tasks and scenes, serving as the core training data source for RT-1 and RT-2 models.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + natural_language_instruction）/ action（7-DoF + gripper + base）, RLDS

name: RoboCat Data
notes: 自我提升的机器人智能体数据，适合多任务学习。
description:
**RoboCat Training Data** is a cross-embodiment multi-task robot dataset released by Google DeepMind.

Enables policy generalization across robot morphologies from a small number of demonstrations, containing manipulation data from diverse robot arms and end-effectors.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + proprioception）/ action（multi-embodiment, various DoF）, RLDS

name: T-Diffusion Data
notes: 扩散模型在机器人操纵中的应用，适合动作生成研究。
description:
**T-Diffusion Training Data** is the companion robot manipulation dataset for temporal diffusion models.

Provides long-sequence robot manipulation trajectories, suitable for diffusion policy training and temporal action prediction research.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + proprioception）/ action（end-effector pose + gripper）, HDF5（用于 Diffusion Policy 训练）

name: AGIBOT WORLD 2026
scale: 数百小时真机数据（五阶段持续发布），100+ 场景，精灵 G2 人形机器人平台
notes: AGIBOT WORLD 2026 real robot dataset. 100% real-world + teleoperation collection on Sprite G2 platform. Multi-modal (RGB-D + tactile + LiDAR + force). Two-phase release (imitation learning + rich interaction). Industry-first dataset focused on physical interaction.
description:
**AGIBOT WORLD 2026** is a large-scale embodied AI dataset officially open-sourced by AGIBOT in April 2026, positioned as the first open data foundation covering the full spectrum of embodied AI research, released in five phases.

**Hardware Platform**: Built on AGIBOT's in-house **Sprite G2** general-purpose humanoid robot, equipped with high-performance joint actuators, multi-modal sensors (multi-view RGB-D, tactile, LiDAR, IMU, force), and a high-performance domain controller.

**Collection**: 100% real-world scenarios + human teleoperation. Uses first-person over-the-horizon teleoperation + Whole-Body Control (WBC), with operators controlling from the robot's perspective. Force-controlled collection captures contact dynamics and force feedback.

**Scenes**: Home, hospitality, commercial spaces, security, industrial logistics — complex real environments with occlusions, backlighting, dynamic crowds, and other real-world noise.

**Two Phases Released**:
- Phase 1 (April 2026): Imitation learning data, hundreds of hours of real-world data with task descriptions, action sequences, atomic skill labels, object annotations, and preserved error recovery trajectories
- Phase 2 (June 3, 2026): **Industry-first open-source dataset focused on physical interaction**, targeting world models and neural simulators. Actively preserves 'failure' data — grasp failures, object slips, collisions, liquid spills, cloth deformation. Experiments confirm that including failure and diverse interaction data significantly improves world model physical consistency

**Ecosystem**: Genie Sim 3.0 simulator + GE-Sim 2.0 world model + GO-2 foundation model + 1:1 digital twin simulation data released in parallel.

**Download**: https://huggingface.co/datasets/agibot-world/AgiBotWorld2026
Project page: https://agibot-world.com

dataFormat.storage: HDF5 + LeRobot 格式（Hugging Face 托管）
dataFormat.size: 数百小时，五阶段持续发布
dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB-D/触觉/LiDAR/IMU/力/关节状态）/ action

dataContent.tasks: 自由形式遥操作任务（模仿学习 + 多样交互），含失败恢复轨迹
dataContent.episodes: 数百小时真机数据（五阶段持续发布）

changelog.text: 首次发布，100万+轨迹、2976小时数据
2026年更新版发布，新增触觉和LiDAR模态

name: RoboMIND
institution: 北京人形机器人创新中心
notes: 国内统一人形数据协议基准。RoboMIND 2.0已发布(2025.12)，新增31万+双臂轨迹、触觉增强。
description:
**RoboMIND** is China's unified humanoid data protocol benchmark, jointly built by multiple research institutions.

**RoboMIND 2.0** was released in December 2025, adding **310K+ dual-arm trajectories** and tactile enhancement. Scale: **60K+ minutes of real robot data**, covering humanoid manipulation tasks with multi-platform joint training support.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + depth + tactile + proprioception）/ action（dual-arm + gripper）/ language_instruction, RLDS

changelog.text: 首次发布，6万+分钟真机数据
RoboMIND 2.0 发布，新增 31万+ 双臂轨迹和触觉增强数据

name: DAMO-SOLO
notes: 阿里达摩院工业机器人操纵数据集，适合工业场景研究。
description:
**DAMO Solo** is a single-arm robot manipulation dataset released by DAMO Academy.

Contains multimodal data from single-arm manipulation tasks, suitable for single-arm policy learning and imitation learning research.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB-D + proprioception）/ action（single-arm 6-DoF + gripper）, HDF5

name: Fourier ActionNet (GR-1 Real Robot Dataset)
scale: 30K+ real robot teleoperation trajectories (~140 hours of interaction data)
notes: Fourier GR-1 real robot dataset (ActionNet), 30K+ teleoperation trajectories under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Bimanual dexterous grasping, cabinet opening, material pouring, and more. Compatible with LeRobot, ACT, DP, iDP3.
description:
**Fourier ActionNet (GR-1 Real Robot Dataset)** is Fourier Intelligence's officially open-sourced full-size humanoid robot manipulation dataset, released in **March 2025**.

**Scale**: **30K+ real robot teleoperation trajectories** (~140 hours of interaction data), covering GR-1 (GR1-T1/T2) and GR-2 models.

**Collection**: Apple Vision Pro as the teleoperation master device, with OAK-D W 97 cameras providing first-person perspective. Data format: **HDF5 (joint states) + MP4 (RGB video) + MKV (depth video)**.

**Annotation & Tasks**: Auto-annotated by Qwen2.5-VL-7B vision-language model with manual secondary verification. Covered tasks: pick-and-place, pouring, cabinet opening, precise placement, noisy manipulation, etc.

**Training Frameworks**: Compatible with **LeRobot, ACT, DP, iDP3** and other mainstream frameworks, with full pipeline toolchain (collection → annotation → training → deployment).

**License**: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (non-commercial open source), training/deployment tools under Apache 2.0. Teleoperation source: https://github.com/FFTAI/teleoperation

NVIDIA has also released a GR-1 simulation dataset series — see 'NVIDIA GR-1 Simulation Datasets' entry. Commercial licensing: gr_opensource@fftai.com. Full-body walking data not yet fully released.

dataFormat.storage: HDF5 (joint states) + MP4 (RGB video) + MKV (depth video)
dataFormat.schema: episode → step → state（joint / pose / hand）/ action（joint / pose / hand）, HDF5 + MP4/MKV

dataContent.scenes: Bimanual dexterous grasping, cabinet opening, material pouring tasks
dataContent.objects: Daily household items (cups, cabinet doors, microwaves, etc.)
dataContent.tasks: Multiple manipulation task types (grasping, cabinet opening, pouring, etc.)

name: NVIDIA GR-1 Simulation Datasets
scale: 1,050+ simulation trajectories (Arena 50 + Teleop-Sim 1,000) + GR00T large-scale sim library (TB-scale)
notes: NVIDIA's official GR-1 simulation dataset series, including Arena (microwave opening with precise annotations) and GR00T-Teleop-Sim (24 tabletop teleoperation tasks), designed for training GR00T N1/N1.5/N1.6 humanoid foundation models.
description:
NVIDIA has released multiple simulation datasets centered on the **GR-1 humanoid robot** for training and fine-tuning the **GR00T series** vision-language-action (VLA) foundation models:

**① Arena-GR1-Manipulation-Task (Tabletop Manipulation)**
Built on the Isaac Lab Arena framework, contains **50 GR-1 microwave-door-opening simulation trajectories**. Provides both annotated and augmented HDF5 formats, with LeRobot format conversion for GR00T N1.5/N1.6 policy training.
Download: https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/Arena-GR1-Manipulation-Task

**② GR00T-Teleop-Sim (Robocasa GR1 Tabletop Tasks)**
**1,000 simulated teleoperation trajectories** covering **24 tabletop manipulation tasks**, collected using GR-1 upper-body control in the Robocasa simulation environment. Includes 44-dim joint states, 44-dim action vectors, 256×256 20fps RGB video, and language instructions. HDF5 format ~14GB, LeRobot format ~39GB. License: CC BY-NC 4.0.
Download: https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/PhysicalAI-Robotics-GR00T-Teleop-Sim (include "robocasa-gr1-tabletop*" subset)

**③ GR00T-X-Embodiment-Sim (GR1 Subsets)**
**TB-scale** large multi-embodiment simulation library containing GR-1 data, including gr1_full_upper_body.Pouring, gr1_arms_waist.CuttingboardToCardboardBox, and more.
Download: https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/PhysicalAI-Robotics-GR00T-X-Embodiment-Sim

Companion GR00T framework: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation / action (LeRobot compatible)

dataContent.scenes: Isaac Sim / Robocasa simulation environments: microwave opening, pick-and-place binning, tabletop object manipulation, etc.
dataContent.objects: Microwaves, cups, cardboard boxes, cans, bottles, and other daily items

name: Unitree LAFAN1 Retargeting Dataset
notes: Unitree's official open-source full-body motion dataset. LAFAN1 mocap data retargeted to H1/H1-2/G1 via Interaction Mesh + IK (Pinocchio). 30FPS CSV joint configurations. Training basis for 2025 Spring Festival Gala dance performance.
scale: 3 humanoid robots (H1 19 joints / H1-2 25 joints / G1 29 joints), LAFAN1 mocap retargeting, 30FPS CSV
description:
Unitree Robotics released this open-source full-body motion dataset in **late 2024**, retargeting Ubisoft's LAFAN1 motion capture data onto **H1 (19 joints), H1-2 (25 joints), and G1 (29 joints)** humanoid robots using numerical optimization (Interaction Mesh + Inverse Kinematics).

**Technical Method**: Motion retargeting powered by the **Pinocchio** rigid-body dynamics library (Maestro Consortium), with constraints including end-effector pose, joint position/velocity limits, and foot-slip prevention. Note: retargeting only accounts for kinematic constraints — no dynamics or actuator limits — so real hardware deployment requires whole-body control (MPC or RL).

**Data Format**: **30FPS CSV files**, each row storing one frame's joint configuration: root joint (XYZ + quaternion) followed by individual joint angles. Includes dance, kicking, and other motion sequences.

**Tools**: Visualization script (rerun_visualize.py) provided, using Pinocchio + **rerun-sdk**. License: motion data **CC BY-NC-ND 4.0**, tools **MIT**.

**Downloads**:
- Official: https://huggingface.co/datasets/unitreerobotics/LAFAN1_Retargeting_Dataset
- Mirror: https://huggingface.co/datasets/lvhaidong/LAFAN1_Retargeting_Dataset
- ModelScope: https://www.modelscope.cn/datasets/AI-ModelScope/LAFAN1_Retargeting_Dataset

**Impact**: Used as the training foundation for Unitree's **2025 Spring Festival Gala** robot dance performance. The Stanford paper **Retargeting Matters** (arXiv:2510.02252, 2025) systematically evaluates retargeting quality's impact on RL policy training, using this dataset as a high-quality baseline. Project page: https://jaraujo98.github.io/retargeting_matters

dataFormat.schema: episode → frame → joint_configuration（root + hip + knee + ankle + shoulder + elbow + wrist）, whole-body 23-DoF

dataContent.episodes: Multiple LAFAN1 mocap sequences, split across 3 robot models

changelog.text: Initial release: LAFAN1 retargeting dataset for H1/H1-2/G1

name: UnifoLM-WBT Whole-Body Teleoperation Dataset
scale: 340+ hours real robot data, 1.89M motion trajectories, G1 humanoid whole-body teleoperation
notes: Unitree's flagship G1 humanoid whole-body teleoperation dataset (March 2026). 340+ hours, 1.89M trajectories, Apache 2.0, RLDS format. Covers home & industrial full-body coordination (walking + grasping + placing). First fully open-source high-quality whole-body teleoperation dataset from a major humanoid manufacturer.
description:
**UnifoLM-WBT (Whole-Body Teleoperation) Dataset** is Unitree's flagship G1 humanoid robot dataset released in **March 2026**, marking the first time a major humanoid robot manufacturer has fully open-sourced high-quality whole-body teleoperation data.

**Scale**: As of March 2026, **340+ hours** of real robot data, **1.89 million motion trajectories**, with ongoing high-frequency updates.

**Key Distinction**: Emphasizes **whole-body coordination** — simultaneously recording bipedal walking, center-of-mass dynamic adjustment, and fine fingertip manipulation, rather than splitting upper/lower body data collection. This is extremely rare among humanoid datasets and directly supports whole-body VLA model training.

**Scenarios**: Real home and industrial open environments — clothing organization, appliance operation, tableware sorting, and other daily tasks.

**Format**: Industry-standard **RLDS format**, directly compatible with the Open X-Embodiment ecosystem and mainstream VLA model training. License: **Apache 2.0** (fully open source, commercial use allowed).

**Download**: https://huggingface.co/collections/unitreerobotics/unifolm-wbt-dataset

**UnifoLM Full-Stack Ecosystem**:
- UnifoLM-WMA-0 (Sept 2025): World Model Action framework (simulation engine)
- UnifoLM-VLA-0 (Jan 2026): Embodied foundation model based on Qwen2.5-VL-7B, handling 12 categories of complex operations via natural language
- UnifoLM-WBT-Dataset (Mar 2026): This dataset, real robot whole-body teleoperation

Together forming an open-source 'Simulation → Foundation Model → Real Robot Data' full-stack training pipeline.
license: Apache 2.0 (Fully open source, commercial use allowed)

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + proprioception + joint_state）/ action（whole-body, RLDS format）

dataContent.scenes: Real home and industrial settings: clothing organization, appliance operation, tableware sorting, etc.
dataContent.objects: Clothing, appliances, tableware, and other daily home/industrial items
dataContent.tasks: Whole-body coordinated manipulation (walking + grasping + placing + fine manipulation)

name: DIGIT Dataset
notes: DIGIT 触觉传感器数据集，适合视觉-触觉融合。
description:
**Digit Dataset** is a manipulation dataset based on the GelSight Digit tactile sensor.

Contains a large collection of fingertip tactile data, suitable for tactile perception, contact state estimation, and dexterous manipulation policy learning.

dataFormat.schema: contact_episode → frame → tactile_image（GelSight DIGIT, 640×480）/ force_torque（FT sensor）/ end-effector_pose, HDF5

name: TacTip Datasets
notes: Bristol Robotics Lab optical tactile sensor dataset series. TacTip biomimetic soft tactile sensing with 3D-printed structures + internal camera. Tactile servoing, super-resolution, texture classification.
description:
**TacTip Tactile Datasets** are a series of optical tactile sensor datasets released by the **Bristol Robotics Laboratory** (Nathan Lepora group).

TacTip is a biomimetic soft optical tactile sensor that senses contact through 3D-printed fingerprint-like structures with an internal camera tracking surface deformation.

**Key Datasets**:
- Bristol Data Repository: tactile servoing, super-resolution, active tactile perception across multiple datasets (tactip-127 and tactip-331 variants)
- Sussex Figshare (2025): Optical tactile texture classification dataset, 15 textures, TacTip drag collection at ~100FPS

**Downloads**:
- Bristol Official: https://data.bristol.ac.uk/data/ (search 'TacTip')
- Texture classification: https://sussex.figshare.com/articles/dataset/Optical_Tactile_TacTip_Dataset_for_texture_classification/26935696

License: UK Non-Commercial Government Licence (free for non-commercial use).

dataFormat.schema: contact_episode → frame → tactile_image（TacTip, internal camera）/ contact_deformation / sensor_pose, HDF5 + PNG

name: GraspNet-1Billion
notes: 超大规模抓取检测数据集。
description:
**GraspNet-1Billion** is the largest robot grasping benchmark dataset to date.

Contains **1 billion+ grasp pose annotations**, covering 190+ objects, with RGB-D images and point cloud data. Suitable for general grasp detection, grasp planning, and unknown-object grasping research.

dataFormat.schema: scene → camera（kinect / realsense）→ RGB-D / segmentation / annotation / rect_grasp / grasp_label（per-object NPZ, 1.1B+ grasps）

name: DexNet 2.0
notes: 抓取姿态规划经典数据集。
description:
**Dex-Net 2.0** is a grasp planning dataset and benchmark released by UC Berkeley.

Built on physics simulation and deep learning, provides **6.7M+ grasp annotations** across diverse grippers and object shapes. Suitable for robust grasp detection and grasp planning research.

dataFormat.schema: object → point_cloud / mesh / grasp_candidate（with GQ-CNN robust_ferrari_canny score）, 6.7M+ grasps, HDF5

name: Matterport3D
notes: 大规模室内场景数据集，常用于导航研究。
description:
**Matterport3D** is a large-scale real indoor 3D scene dataset.

Contains 3D scan data of **90 complete building floors**, covering residential, office, hotel, and other scene types. It is the standard scene data source for simulation platforms such as Habitat and Gibson.

dataFormat.schema: building → floor → room → 3D_mesh（GLB/glTF）/ panorama_images（RGB-D）/ camera_poses / semantic_labels（90 buildings）

name: RoboNat
notes: 自然语言交互机器人数据集。
description:
**RoboNat** is a robot manipulation dataset in natural outdoor settings.

Collected in unstructured natural environments (outdoors, gardens, farms, etc.), providing RGB-D and proprioceptive data, suitable for outdoor robot manipulation and autonomous navigation research.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB-D + GPS + IMU）/ action（mobile_base + arm）, HDF5

name: Humanoid Everyday
notes: 2025年开源人形机器人日常操作数据集，含人机交互场景，支持云端评测。
description:
**Humanoid Everyday Locomotion** is a humanoid robot daily locomotion dataset, focused on real-world full-body motion control and planning.

Covers walking, turning, ascending/descending slopes, and other daily movement patterns, suitable for humanoid robot reinforcement learning and imitation learning research.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + depth + IMU + joint_state）/ action（full-body joint_targets + root_velocity）/ reward, HDF5

name: Dexora
notes: ICRA 2026，36-DoF双臂灵巧手操作数据集，HuggingFace开源，347种物体。
description:
**DexORA** is a 36-DoF dual-arm dexterous manipulation dataset published at **ICRA 2026**, open-sourced on HuggingFace.

Features **347 objects**, with **12.2K real robot + 100K simulation** trajectories. Covers dual-arm manipulation and precise assembly tasks, suitable for dexterous policy learning and Sim-to-Real transfer research.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（multi-view RGB + depth + proprioception + tactile）/ action（36-DoF dual-arm dexterous + gripper）, HDF5

name: RealSource
notes: 2026年发布，北京人形机器人数据训练中心采集，多模态完整度100%。
description:
**RealSource** is a real-object 3D scanning dataset released by the RoboCo team.

Contains high-precision 3D models of a large collection of everyday objects, suitable for robot grasping simulation, Sim-to-Real transfer, and scene reconstruction research.

dataFormat.schema: object → multi-view_RGB-D_images / point_cloud / 3D_mesh（high-precision scan）, HDF5

name: 10Kh RealOmni-Open
notes: 目前最大规模开源具身数据集，数据来自3000个真实家庭，HuggingFace可下载。
description:
**10KH RealOmni** is an omnidirectional-view robot manipulation dataset.

Provides multi-view RGB-D video and action trajectories, covering tabletop and mobile manipulation scenarios, suitable for multi-view policy learning.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（omni-directional RGB-D, multi-camera）/ action（end-effector pose）/ language_instruction, HDF5

name: RoboCOIN
notes: 2025年发布，跨具身双臂操作数据集，421个任务，支持层级能力标注。
description:
**RoboCoin** is a contact and interaction focused robot manipulation dataset.

Contains rich force control, tactile, and proprioceptive data, suitable for learning fine-grained contact manipulation policies and force-control models.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（RGB + tactile + force_torque + proprioception）/ action（contact-rich manipulation）, RLDS

name: OpenLET
institution: 乐聚机器人 + 上海交大等
notes: 2026年中国首个开源具身智能数据平台，含触觉灵巧操作+全身运动数据。 Official site provides dataset documentation, SDK code, and annotation docs.
description:
**OpenLET** is an open humanoid robot locomotion learning dataset and benchmark.

Provides standardized full-body motion trajectories and evaluation protocols, supporting cross-platform motion policy transfer and whole-body control research. Dataset download guide available at the OpenAtom community.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation（proprioception + base_pose）/ action（joint_positions, full-body locomotion + manipulation）, CSV/HDF5

name: UniACT
notes: Standardizes 6 open-source datasets (OXE, OXE-AugE, AgiBot-Beta, RoboCoin, RoboMind, Galaxea) into a unified delta-pose + rotation-vector action space with dual-arm padding. ⚠️ Do not confuse with Tsinghua UniAct (2025 framework) — UniACT is a dataset by AMAP CV Lab.
description:
**UniACT** is a cross-embodiment robot manipulation dataset released by AMAP CV Lab, open-sourced with ABot-M0.

It integrates and standardizes **6 major open-source datasets** (Open X-Embodiment, OXE-AugE, AgiBot-Beta, RoboCoin, RoboMind, Galaxea), covering **20+ robot morphologies**, totaling **6M+ trajectories, 9,500+ hours** of data.

UniACT's core contribution is **unified action representation**: all heterogeneous data is converted to end-effector delta pose + rotation vector, padded to a standard dual-arm format, enabling cross-embodiment VLA model pre-training. This dataset is the training foundation of the ABot-M0 model.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation / action (delta pose + rotation vector, dual-arm padded)

changelog.text: Initial release with ABot-M0: standardized integration of 6 source datasets

name: Galaxea Open-World Dataset (GOD)
notes: Unified hardware collection, real open-world scenes, fine-grained language annotations. 400K+ downloads in two months, one of the most-watched embodied AI datasets globally. Accompanied by G0 dual-system VLA model.
description:
**Galaxea Open-World Dataset (GOD)** is a real-robot embodied AI dataset released by Galaxea in **August 2025**.

**Collection**: All data comes from the in-house R1 Lite mobile dual-arm robot (23 DoF), with unified hardware ensuring consistent action and perception spaces.

**Scale**: **500 hours** of real manipulation data (>10TB), **100K+ trajectories**, covering 150 task types, 50 real-world scenes (residential 50.8%, food service 33.2%, retail 8.7%, office 7.4%), **1,600+ unique objects**, and 58 manipulation skills.

**Quality**: Collected in non-lab environments with dynamic lighting, occlusions, and disturbances. Provides sub-task-level natural language annotations, supporting hierarchical robot learning. Standardized RLDS/LeRobot format with full metadata; a few-shot subset is also available for quick testing.

Companion open-source G0 dual-system VLA model (VLM multimodal planning + VLA fine-grained execution), already supporting external research projects such as NVIDIA EgoScale and Ant Lingbot-VLA.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation (RGB + depth + proprioception) / action (23-DoF) / language_instruction

changelog.text: Initial release: 500 hours of real-world manipulation data, 100K+ trajectories, with G0 model
Surpassed 400K downloads, becoming one of the most-watched embodied AI datasets globally

name: OXE-AugE
notes: Large-scale cross-embodiment augmentation of OXE. Cross-Painting renders real trajectories onto 9 virtual robots with visual + kinematic fidelity, designed for cross-embodiment generalization.
description:
**OXE-AugE (Open X-Embodiment Augmented Embodiments)** is a large-scale derivative dataset released in late 2025, applying cross-morphology data augmentation to Google's Open X-Embodiment.

**Augmentation Method**: 16 major subsets are selected from the original OXE (1M trajectories). Using **Cross-Painting + AugE-Toolkit**, each trajectory is migrated and rendered onto other robots, ensuring kinematically valid and visually realistic results.

**Scale**: Each original trajectory generates 8 cross-embodiment virtual trajectories + 1 original, totaling **4.4M+ trajectories**, covering Franka, UR5, xArm, WidowX, Google Robot, Jaco, Sawyer, Kinova Gen3, KUKA iiwa — **9 robot morphologies** in total.

**Impact**: The top 4 robots account for 85% of trajectories in the original OXE; AugE enforces balanced distribution, greatly improving diversity. Unified RLDS format, directly loadable with TFDS. Experiments show that policies trained with AugE significantly outperform those trained on real data alone for unseen robot generalization.

dataFormat.schema: OXE-compatible — episode → step → observation / action / reward / discount

changelog.text: Initial release: 4.4M+ trajectories, 9 robot embodiments, Cross-Painting augmentation

quality.annotation: 基于 OXE 原始标注
quality.realWorld: 真实数据增强（视觉+运动学保真）

name: DROID
institution: Stanford / Google / UC Berkeley et al. (18 labs)
notes: 18-lab collaboration, Franka Panda unified platform, RLDS format compatible with OXE. Policy generalization improves ~20%.
description:
**DROID (Distributed Robot Interaction Dataset)** is a large-scale real-world robot manipulation dataset released in March 2024 by a consortium of **18 research institutions** including Stanford, Google, and UC Berkeley.

**Collection Scale**: 50 data collectors across **52 buildings and 564 scenes** using a unified Franka Panda robot platform, collecting **76,000+ manipulation trajectories** (350 interaction hours) over 12 months, with ~76K successes + ~16K failures.

**Data Content**: Each trajectory includes 3 camera viewpoints, depth information, camera calibration, and language annotations.

**Format & Impact**: Released in RLDS format (1.7TB), compatible with the Open X-Embodiment ecosystem. Experiments show that co-training with DROID improves policy performance, robustness, and generalization by an average of **~20%**.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation (3× RGB + depth + calibration) / action / language_instruction

citation.authors: Alexander Khazatsky, Karl Pertsch et al. (18 institutions)

changelog.text: Initial release: 76K trajectories, 564 scenes, 350h interaction data

name: MimicGen
notes: NVIDIA CoRL 2023. Automatically generates large-scale sim trajectories from few human demos. Cross-robot, cross-object. Hugging Face hosted, robomimic compatible.
description:
**MimicGen** is a data generation system published by NVIDIA Research at **CoRL 2023**, capable of automatically synthesizing large-scale, diverse robot manipulation datasets from a small number of human demonstrations (10 per task) in simulation.

**Data Composition**: Includes source (120 human demos), core (26,000 generated samples, 26 distribution variants), robot (16,000, 4 different robot arms), object (2,000, different objects), and large_interpolation (6,000, high difficulty) — totaling **48,000+ demonstration trajectories**.

Released in HDF5 format on Hugging Face, compatible with the **robomimic** framework for BC, BC-RNN, BC-Transformer, and other imitation learning algorithms.

dataFormat.schema: demonstration → states / actions / rewards / dones (robomimic compatible)

dataContent.objects: Diverse everyday objects (blocks, mugs, coffee machines, etc.)
dataContent.tasks: 12 manipulation tasks (pick-place, stacking, coffee, door opening, etc.)

citation.authors: Ajay Mandlekar, Soroush Nasiriany et al. (NVIDIA)

changelog.text: CoRL 2023 release: 48K+ demos, 12 tasks, 4 robot arm variants
Migrated to Hugging Face hosting, deprecated Google Drive links

quality.annotation: 自动生成（MimicGen 数据增强）

name: RoboCasa
notes: RSS 2024. Large-scale kitchen simulation with 2500+ 3D assets. MimicGen auto-augmentation, sim-to-real transfer. Supports mobile manipulators and humanoids.
description:
**RoboCasa** is a large-scale home task simulation framework and dataset released by UT Austin and NVIDIA Research at **RSS 2024**.

**Scene Scale**: Built on MuJoCo physics engine + NVIDIA Omniverse rendering, containing **2,500+ 3D assets** (153+ object categories), **120 unique kitchen scenes** (10 floor plans × 12 architectural styles), **100 tasks** (25 atomic + 75 LLM-generated composite tasks like brewing coffee, meal prep, cleaning).

**Data Generation**: Uses MimicGen to automatically generate **100K+ trajectories** from a small number of human demonstrations, supporting mobile manipulators and humanoids.

Generative AI-assisted (Luma.ai for 3D objects, MidJourney for textures and domain randomization). Trained policies can sim-to-real transfer to real robots.

dataFormat.schema: demonstration → states / actions / rewards / dones

citation.authors: Soroush Nasiriany, Abhiram Maddukuri et al. (UT Austin / NVIDIA)

changelog.text: RSS 2024 initial release: 100K+ trajectories, 120 kitchen scenes, 100 tasks

quality.realWorld: 仿真（支持 sim-to-real 迁移）

name: ARNOLD
institution: UCLA / Peking Univ / Tsinghua Univ / BIGAI
scale: 8 language-conditioned tasks, 40 objects, 20 scenes, ~10K expert demos
notes: ICCV 2023 / CVPR 2024 Embodied AI Workshop. First benchmark for continuous-goal language grounding. NVIDIA Isaac Sim.
description:
**ARNOLD** (A Benchmark for Language-Grounded Task Learning With Continuous States in Realistic 3D Scenes) is a language-conditioned manipulation benchmark published at **ICCV 2023** with a challenge track at CVPR 2024 Embodied AI Workshop.

**Key Distinction**: Unlike traditional discrete goals (open/close), ARNOLD focuses on **continuous target states** (e.g., open a drawer 50%, lift a bottle to a specific height, rotate to a specified angle), better reflecting real manipulation requirements.

**Benchmark Scale**: 20 photorealistic 3D indoor scenes, 40 objects, 8 language-conditioned tasks (pick-and-place, rotation, drawer/cabinet opening, water pouring/transferring) built in NVIDIA Isaac Sim, with **~10K expert demonstrations** and template-generated language instructions.

Benchmark evaluation reveals that state-of-the-art language-conditioned policy models still face significant challenges in generalizing to unseen scenes, objects, and target states.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation (RGB + depth + proprioception) / action / language_goal (continuous)

citation.authors: Ran Gong, Jiangyong Huang et al. (UCLA/PKU/Tsinghua/BIGAI)

changelog.text: arXiv preprint released
ICCV 2023 publication
CVPR 2024 Embodied AI Workshop ARNOLD Challenge

quality.annotation: 模板自动生成（语言指令）

name: RoboNet
notes: CoRL 2019. Known as 'ImageNet for robotics.' TFDS direct loading, cross-robot video prediction.
description:
**RoboNet** is a large-scale multi-robot interaction dataset jointly released by UC Berkeley, Stanford, UPenn, and CMU, published at **CoRL 2019** and dubbed the 'ImageNet for Robotics'.

**Scale**: **15M+ video frames** from 7 different robot platforms and 113 camera viewpoints, totaling **162,417 examples**.

**Format**: Released in TFDS format (full ~36GB), available in 64×64 and 128×128 resolutions.

The core insight is learning generalizable physical world dynamics priors through large-scale, cross-robot, cross-scene video prediction, advancing robot learning from single-task to general-purpose manipulation capabilities.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → image (64×64 or 128×128) / state (5-dim end-effector) / action (5-dim delta)

dataContent.tasks: Various manipulation tasks (push, grasp, place, etc.)

citation.authors: Sudeep Dasari, Frederik Ebert et al. (UC Berkeley/Stanford/UPenn/CMU)

changelog.text: CoRL 2019 initial release: 15M+ frames, 7 robot platforms

quality.annotation: 自动记录（机器人状态/动作）

name: Ego4D
institution: Meta AI / UT Austin / CMU et al. (13 universities)
notes: CVPR 2022. World's largest egocentric video dataset. 5 benchmarks (episodic memory, hand-object, audio-visual conversation, social, forecasting). Requires data use agreement.
description:
**Ego4D** is the world's largest first-person (egocentric) video dataset and benchmark, released by **Meta AI (FAIR)** together with **13 universities** worldwide at **CVPR 2022**.

**Collection Scale**: 931 camera wearers across 9 countries and 74 locations, capturing **3,670 hours** of continuous daily video (~7TB) with **3.8M narrative text pairs**.

**Five Benchmark Tasks**: Episodic Memory, Hand-Object Manipulation, Audio-Visual Conversation, Social Interaction, and Activity Forecasting — directly mapping to robot perception, planning, and interaction capabilities.

Companion **EgoVLP** (NeurIPS 2022) pre-training framework. Download requires signing a data use agreement on the official website.

dataFormat.schema: video_component → canonical_video → canonical_clip → frame（annotations: narration / FHO / NLQ / VQ / AV）, 30fps, 3670h

citation.authors: Kristen Grauman, Andrew Westbury et al. (Meta AI + 13 universities)

changelog.text: CVPR 2022 initial release: 3,670h video, 5 benchmarks
EgoVLP pretraining framework released (NeurIPS 2022)

name: HANDAL (Household ANnotated Dataset for functionAL grasping)
scale: 308K 标注帧 + 2.2K 视频，212 个真实物体 + 17 类别
notes: NVIDIA IROS 2023，首个类别级 6-DoF 位姿 + 可供性标注的真实物体数据集。提供像素级 3D handle affordance 分割、物体 6-DoF 位姿、2D/3D 重建网格。AFUN 在 HANDAL-Mini/Easy/Hard 三个测试集上取得 SOTA。
description:
**HANDAL（Household ANnotated Dataset for functionAL grasping）**是 NVIDIA 于 IROS 2023 发布的可供性分割基准数据集。

**规模**：**30.8 万** 标注帧、**2.2K** 视频序列、**212** 个真实世界物体，覆盖 **17 个类别**（工具箱类：锤子、钳子、螺丝刀、扳手等；厨房类：铲子、量杯、滤网等）。

**标注内容**：类别级 6-DoF 位姿 + 尺度、像素级物体分割、**像素级 3D handle affordance 分割**、2D 边界框、3D 物体网格重建。

**测试拆分**：HANDAL-Mini / HANDAL Easy / HANDAL Hard 三个测试集，分别测试模型在不同难度下的可供性分割能力。

**协议**：CC BY-NC-SA 4.0。

AFUN 论文在 HANDAL 三个测试集上全面超越所有基线（+23.9 gIoU）。

dataFormat.schema: scene → object_category → frame → RGB / depth / affordance_mask / 6D_pose / mesh

dataContent.scenes: 桌面/工作台，含遮挡与多角度视角
dataContent.objects: 212 个真实物体（17 类别：锤子、钳子、螺丝刀、铲子、滤网等）
dataContent.tasks: functional grasping（功能性抓取：识别并抓取物体的正确操作部位）

name: 3DOI (3D Object Interaction)
scale: ~10K 图像 + 密集可供性标注
notes: UMich ICCV 2023，从单张 RGB 图像预测 3D 物体交互点与可供性。标注了接触点、关节类型、可移动性等物理属性。AFUN 在 3DOI / 3DOI Easy 两个测试集上取得 SOTA。
description:
**3DOI（3D Object Interaction）**是密歇根大学于 ICCV 2023 提出的 3D 物体交互理解数据集。

**规模**：约 **1 万张** RGB 图像，来源涵盖互联网视频、第一人称视频及 3D 数据集渲染。

**标注内容**：交互查询点、可供性关键点、2D 边界框、关节类型（旋转/平移/固定）、可移动性、夹具标签。

**核心任务**：从单张 RGB 图像 + 查询点，预测可供性分割掩码和 3D 交互 affordance map。

**测试拆分**：3DOI（标准）和 3DOI Easy（简化）两个测试集。

AFUN 在 3DOI 分割任务上大幅超越所有基线。

dataFormat.schema: image → query_point → affordance_mask / interaction_keypoint / articulation_type

dataContent.scenes: 互联网视频 + 第一人称视频 + 3D 数据集渲染
dataContent.objects: 多样化日常物品（含铰接和刚体）
dataContent.tasks: 3D 物体交互点预测、可供性分割、物理属性识别

name: HOVA-500K (Human-Object Visual Affordance 500K)
scale: 50 万张 RGB 图像 + 1,726 物体类别 + 675 动作类别
notes: HKUST 2025 (GLOVER++)，当前最大规模的视觉可供性数据集。从 Ego4D/EPIC-KITCHENS 等人类视频自动提取手-物接触帧并回投标注。AFUN 在 HOVA-500K 可供性分割上取得 SOTA，并在其基础上转换生成了分割训练数据。
description:
**HOVA-500K（Human-Object Visual Affordance 500K）**是 HKUST（广州）于 2025 年发布的大规模视觉可供性数据集，伴随 GLOVER++ 模型。

**规模**：**50 万** 张 RGB 图像，覆盖 **1,726** 个物体类别和 **675** 个动作/动词类别，是目前最大规模的 visual affordance 数据集。

**采集方式**：从 Ego4D、EPIC-KITCHENS 等第一人称人类视频中检测手-物接触帧，通过 homography 反投影将接触点映射到无遮挡帧，实现毫米级交互点标注。

**标注**：point-level Gaussian heatmap（非区域掩码），以接触点为中心的高斯热力图，精度可达毫米级。

**关联模型**：GLOVER++（全局-局部可供性训练框架），仅 8.1M 可训练参数，在真实机器人零样本操作中达 73.3% 成功率。

AFUN 将 HOVA-500K 的 point-level 标注转换为分割掩码用于训练，并在其测试集上取得 SOTA。

dataFormat.schema: image → object_category / action_category → contact_heatmap（Gaussian keypoint）

dataContent.scenes: Ego4D/EPIC-KITCHENS 等第一人称视频中的日常生活场景
dataContent.tasks: 视觉可供性关键点预测、可供性分割、接触点预测

quality.collection: 多源聚合（Ego4D/EPIC-KITCHENS 自动标注）

name: ReasonAFF (Reasoning-based Affordance Dataset)
scale: 48 物体类别 + 30 可供性类别 + GPT-4o 推理指令重写
notes: 上海 AI Lab 2025 (Affordance-R1)，基于 InstructPart 扩展的推理级可供性数据集。将直接指令改写为隐含推理问题（如 '打开垃圾桶应该碰哪里？'），考验 MLLM 的 Chain-of-Thought 可供性推理。AFUN 在 ReasonAFF 上大幅超越 Seg-Zero/Vision Reasoner/Qwen2.5VL 等基线。
description:
**ReasonAFF** 是上海 AI Lab 于 2025 年伴随 Affordance-R1 模型发布的推理级可供性数据集。

**数据来源**：基于 InstructPart 数据集，通过 GPT-4o 将原来的直接指令（如 'segment the lid'）改写为隐含推理问题（如 'Where would you place your hand if you wanted to open this trash can?'）。

**规模**：覆盖 **48** 个物体类别、**30** 个可供性类别，每条数据包含推理指令 + 可供性分割掩码 + 边界框 + 中心点。

**核心创新**：将可供性分割从纯视觉任务升级为视觉-语言推理任务，需要模型先理解任务语义再定位操作部位。

**关联模型**：Affordance-R1，采用纯强化学习（GRPO）训练，零样本泛化到 AGD20K/UMD 等 OOD 数据集。

AFUN 在 ReasonAFF 上取得 gIoU 67.41 / cIoU 62.72 的 SOTA 成绩。

dataFormat.schema: image → reasoning_instruction（GPT-4o 改写）/ affordance_mask / bbox / centroid

dataContent.scenes: 日常家庭场景（基于 InstructPart 图像 + HOI 图像）
dataContent.objects: 48 类日常物体（垃圾桶、微波炉、水龙头等）
dataContent.tasks: 推理级可供性分割（Chain-of-Thought affordance reasoning + segmentation）
dataContent.episodes: ~2.4K 图像（含 GPT-4o 推理指令）

name: InstructPart
scale: 2,400 真实图像 + 48 物体类别 + 9,600 任务指令
notes: CMU ACL 2025 Main，首个桥接任务导向交互与部件分割的基准。含 9,600 条人工标注任务指令（TRPS 任务推理部件分割 + ORPS 指代部件分割）。AFUN 在 InstructPart 可供性分割上取得 SOTA。
description:
**InstructPart** 是 CMU 机器人研究所于 ACL 2025 (Main) 提出的任务导向部件分割基准。

**规模**：**2,400** 张真实世界图像，覆盖 **48** 个物体类别、**44** 个部件类别、**30** 个可供性类别、**37** 个动作类别。

**标注**：**9,600** 条人工标注任务指令（含专家标注 + GPT-polished + 人工核验），像素级分割掩码。

**两大任务**：
1. **TRPS（Task Reasoning Part Segmentation）**——给定任务指令+图像，推理并分割出正确操作部件（如 '拉开微波炉需要碰哪个部位？'）
2. **ORPS（Oracle Referring Part Segmentation）**——给定直接部件/物体指代，分割对应部件（如 '水龙头的把手'）

**协议**：CC BY 4.0。

AFUN 在 InstructPart 上与 ReasonAFF 一起作为核心可供性分割评测基准。

dataFormat.schema: image → task_instruction → part_segmentation_mask / affordance_label / object_category

dataContent.objects: 48 类日常物体（微波炉、水龙头、垃圾桶、剪刀等）
dataContent.tasks: TRPS（任务推理部件分割）+ ORPS（指代部件分割）

name: SceneFun3D
scale: 710 个高精度 3D 室内场景 + 14.8K+ 交互标注 + 3,000+ 任务描述
notes: ETH/Microsoft CVPR 2024 Oral，首个精细 3D 场景功能理解数据集。Faro 激光扫描仪捕捉 710 个真实室内场景，标注了把手、旋钮、按钮、开关等细小可交互元素。AFUN 在 SceneFun3D 的 3D 运动预测（n=721）上取得 SOTA。
description:
**SceneFun3D** 是 ETH Zürich / Google / TUM / Microsoft 联合发表于 CVPR 2024 (Oral) 的精细 3D 场景功能理解数据集。

**规模**：**710** 个高精度 3D 室内场景（Faro 激光扫描仪采集，远超 RGB-D 重建精度），**14,800+** 精细交互标注，**3,000+** 自然语言任务描述，覆盖 **9** 个可供性类别（旋转、钩拉、推按等）。

**独特之处**：标注了传统 RGB-D 重建（ScanNet/Matterport3D）中不可见的细小功能元素——门把手、旋钮、按钮、开关、拨杆等。

**三大基准任务**：
1. **Functionality Segmentation**：3D 点云中分割功能元素并预测可供性标签
2. **Task-Driven Affordance Grounding**：根据自然语言任务描述定位功能元素
3. **3D Motion Estimation**：预测交互所需的运动参数（运动类型、轴、原点）

**协议**：CC BY-NC-SA 4.0。

AFUN 使用 SceneFun3D 作为训练数据源和 3D 运动测试集（n=721），在 ADE/FDE/CIM 三个指标上全面超越 General Flow 等基线。

dataFormat.schema: scene → functional_element → affordance_label / 3D_motion_params（type + axis + origin）/ task_description

dataContent.objects: 门把手、旋钮、按钮、开关、抽屉拉手、水龙头等细小功能元素
dataContent.tasks: 功能分割 + 任务驱动可供性定位 + 3D 运动参数估计

name: RoboMIND 2.0
institution: 北京人形机器人创新中心 / 北京大学
scale: 31 万+ 演示轨迹 + 1,000+ 小时 + 759 任务 + 6 种机器人形态
notes: RoboMIND v2.0，首次大规模覆盖双臂移动操作 + 触觉感知的真实机器人数据集。31 万+ 轨迹、6 种形态（含天工人形机器人）、1,139 种物体。AFUN 将 RoboMIND2 作为训练源和域外 3D 运动测试集（n=156），验证开放场景泛化能力。
description:
**RoboMIND 2.0** 是北京人形机器人创新中心与北京大学于 2025 年 12 月发布的超大规模多模态真实机器人操作数据集，是 RoboMIND 1.0 (RSS 2025) 的全面升级。

**数据规模**：**31 万+** 演示轨迹、**1,000+** 小时操作数据、**759** 种精细任务、**1,139** 种交互物体、覆盖 **11** 个核心场景（工业分拣、化学实验室、家庭厨房、家电交互等）。

**多形态覆盖**：**6 种机器人形态**——Franka Emika Panda、UR5e、AgileX 轮式双臂平台、'天工'全尺寸人形机器人（含灵巧手）、'天轶'轮式人形机器人、ARX 轮式机器人。

**多模态感知**：
- **视觉**：多视角 RGB-D
- **触觉**：1.2 万条触觉增强片段（法向力 + 切向力），行业首次大规模集成
- **语言**：Gemini 辅助生成的精细任务描述
- **本体感知**：完整关节状态

**训练框架**：配套 MIND-2 分层架构——慢系统（VLM 推理规划）+ 快系统（VLA 实时控制），采用 Implicit Q-Learning 离线 RL 训练。

**协议**：CC BY-NC 4.0。

AFUN 使用 RoboMIND2 作为训练数据源，并将其测试集（n=156）作为域外（out-of-domain）3D 运动评测基准。

name: HOI4D (4D Egocentric Human-Object Interaction)
scale: 2.4M RGB-D 帧 + 4,000+ 序列 + 800 物体实例 + 16 类别
notes: 清华/北大 CVPR 2022，首个大规模 4D 第一人称人-物交互数据集。含全景分割、运动分割、3D 手部姿态、类别级 6-DoF 物体位姿。AFUN 将其作为人类第一人称训练数据源（1,020 episodes）。
description:
**HOI4D（4D Egocentric Human-Object Interaction）**是清华大学与北京大学于 CVPR 2022 发布的大规模 4D 第一人称人-物交互数据集。

**规模**：**240 万** RGB-D 第一人称视频帧、**4,000+** 交互序列、**800** 个物体实例（16 类别，含刚体和铰接物体）、**610** 个不同室内场景。

**采集方式**：头戴式 Intel RealSense D455 + Kinect v2 采集，9 名参与者在自然室内环境中进行日常操作。

**标注**：逐帧全景分割、运动分割、3D 手部姿态、类别级物体 6-DoF 位姿（含铰接物体关节状态）、动作分割标签。

**三大基准任务**：
1. 4D 动态点云序列语义分割
2. 类别级物体位姿跟踪
3. 第一人称动作分割

**协议**：CC BY-NC-SA 4.0。

AFUN 将 HOI4D 作为人类第一人称（human egocentric）训练数据源，从中提取 2,165 个动作区间用于可供性学习。

name: VITRA (Scalable VLA Pretraining with Human Activity Videos)
scale: 1,098,944 动作区间（基于 EPIC-KITCHENS + Ego4D 人类视频）
notes: Microsoft 2025，规模化 VLA 预训练数据集。从 EPIC-KITCHENS 和 Ego4D 人类活动视频中提取操作片段，提供逐帧 SLAM 相机内外参。AFUN 的最大训练数据源（129,433 条拟合曲线）。
description:
**VITRA（Scalable Vision-Language-Action Model Pretraining with Human Activity Videos）**是 Microsoft Research 于 2025 年发布的规模化 VLA 预训练数据集。

**规模**：基于 **EPIC-KITCHENS** 和 **Ego4D** 两大第一人称视频数据集，提取了约 **110 万** 个操作动作区间，累计约 130 万视角观测。

**核心技术**：为第一人称视频提供逐帧 **SLAM 相机内参和外参**，解决了第一人称视频中相机运动噪声的核心挑战——使轨迹可几何投影到 3D 空间。

**标注**：使用 VLM + SAM3 跟踪 → 深度反投影 → Bézier 曲线拟合的自动化管线，从人类操作视频中提取物体运动轨迹。

**协议**：CC BY 4.0。

AFUN 将 VITRA 作为最大的训练数据来源（human egocentric 类别），从中生成了 129,433 条有效 Bézier 样条运动曲线。

dataFormat.schema: video_clip → action_interval → RGB_frames + SLAM_camera_poses + object_track + Bézier_curve

description:
**BC-Z（BC-Zero）**是 Google Robotics、Everyday Robots、UC Berkeley 和 Stanford 于 2022 年联合发布的大规模机器人模仿学习数据集。

**规模**：**39,350** 条训练轨迹 + **3,914** 条验证轨迹，覆盖 **100 种** 桌面操作任务（抓取、开抽屉、摆物件、倒水等），累计 125 小时机器人操作数据。

**采集方式**：7 名操作员通过 DAgger（Dataset Aggregation）方式远程操控 12 台 Franka Panda 机械臂，交替执行自主策略和遥操作干预。

**数据格式**：TFDS（TensorFlow Datasets），每条轨迹包含：RGB 图像观测 (171×213)、末端执行器 3D 位置残差 + 轴角旋转残差 + 夹爪开合、自然语言任务指令 + 512 维 Universal Sentence Encoder 嵌入。

**核心特性**：零样本任务泛化——通过语言描述或人类操作视频即可执行训练中未见过的任务。是 OpenVLA、RT-1 等 VLA 模型的核心预训练子集。

**协议**：CC BY 4.0。

scale: ALOHA Sim ~5 GB + Mobile ALOHA 50+ GB + ALOHA 2 26K+ 轨迹 + LeRobot 多子集

description:
**ALOHA（A Low-cost Open-source Hardware System for Bimanual Teleoperation）**是 Stanford 于 2023 年提出的低成本双臂遥操作平台，配套数据集已成为精细操作领域的标杆基准。

**平台组成**：
- **ALOHA Stationary**：双 ViperX 300 机械臂（6-DoF + 夹爪），桌面固定
- **Mobile ALOHA**：ALOHA 双臂 + AgileX Tracer 移动底盘，支持移动操作
- **ALOHA 2**（Google DeepMind 2024）：26,000+ 演示轨迹，5 项高难度灵巧任务

**数据集组成**：
- **ALOHA Sim 数据集**（~5 GB，Google Drive）：仿真 Transfer Cube / Bimanual Insertion 任务的脚本演示 + 人类遥操作数据
- **Mobile ALOHA 数据集**（50+ GB，TFDS）：真实场景下 7 类家务任务（炒虾、擦桌子、叠衣服等）
- **LeRobot ALOHA 子集**（HuggingFace）：`lerobot/aloha_static_coffee` 等多个标准化子集

**适配算法**：ACT、Diffusion Policy、VINN、DiT-Policy、π0 等。

**协议**：MIT（代码），CC BY 4.0（数据）。

scale: 10 亿帧合成抓取数据 + 10,000+ 物体 + 240 物体类别
notes: Galbot/北大 CoRL 2025，十亿级合成抓取基础模型 GraspVLA 配套数据集 SynGrasp-1B。MuJoCo 物理 + Isaac Sim 光追渲染，100 条微调即达 90% 工业件成功率。透明物体抓取 86.6%（传统方法仅 10%）。LIBERO 长程 94.1% 零样本。
description: GraspVLA / SynGrasp-1B 是 Galbot、北京大学、港大和北京智源于 CoRL 2025 发布的十亿级合成抓取数据集。规模：10 亿帧合成抓取数据，覆盖 10,000+ 物体（240 类别，来自 Objaverse）。生成管线：MuJoCo 物理仿真稳定抓取 + BoDex 反掌抓取生成 + CuRobo 无碰撞轨迹规划 + Isaac Sim 光追真实渲染。关键能力：零样本合成类别 93.3% 真实世界成功率；零样本互联网类别 86.6%；透明物体 86.6%（AnyGrasp 仅 10%）通过 RGB 多视角 + 语义推理绕过深度传感器局限；少样本微调 100 条 demo 即从 30% 提升到 90%。协议：CC BY 4.0。

dataFormat.schema: episode -> step -> observation（multi-view RGB + depth + proprioception）/ action（grasp_pose + gripper）/ object_category

sensors: 多视角 RGB-D（Isaac Sim 光追）
dataContent.scenes: 仿真桌面场景（域随机化）
dataContent.tasks: 零样本抓取、少样本微调、长程任务（LIBERO）、透明物体抓取

quality.collection: 仿真生成（MuJoCo + Isaac Sim 光追）
